access_route_hint: memd access route says: Bitwarden is installed but locked or unknown; ask user to unlock before workaround. After the approved route is available, export SUPERMEMORY_API_KEY only for this process or provide an explicit replay artifact. Do not store the secret in memd.

notes: memd stores access metadata and secret refs only, never secret values
locked providers should trigger an ask-user-to-unlock route, not workaround churn

routes.guidance: Bitwarden is installed but locked or unknown; ask user to unlock before workaround.
